basics.name: Seifeddine LARGAT
basics.label: Senior Web Developer
basics.summary: Tech Lead and Senior Full-Stack Developer with 7+ years of experience specializing in JavaScript, TypeScript and PHP web stacks. I have worked with major CAC 40 companies and innovative startups, leading technical teams, establishing guidelines and best practices, driving cloud architecture decisions (AWS), and implementing CI/CD automation. My strong communication skills and commitment to delivery have consistently ensured project success at every stage.
basics.seoDescription: Senior Full-Stack Developer & Tech Lead with 7+ years of experience in JavaScript, TypeScript, Angular & Node.js. Worked with TotalEnergies, EDF and Air Liquide.

work.name: EDF
work.summary: Intervened for EDF, France and Europe's leading electricity producer. The objective was to industrialize and secure a prototype vehicle ownership cost simulation application for commercial transport (internal use), and transform it into a platform capable of evolving into a simulator for any type of vehicle, with full administrator control: granular access management, membership waitlist, data referential updates, and calculation parameter configuration.
responsibilities: Industrialization of an existing prototype
Evolution, improvement and enrichment of prototype features
Optimization of calculation formulas
Creation of the front-end and back-end (REST API) application foundation
Implementation of development standards and patterns to anticipate future evolutions
Normalization of development and delivery processes
Writing technical documentation

work.name: Veolia Water Technologies
responsibilities: Collaborated with senior developers to design and implement web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks.
Assisted in debugging and optimizing front-end code to ensure smooth user experiences.
Participated in code reviews and contributed to improving coding standards within the team.

work.name: Air Liquide
work.summary: Intervened for Air Liquide, world leader in gases, technologies and services for industry and healthcare. The mission focused on evolving and maintaining a strategic customer portal: delivering new features while fixing existing issues, progressively absorbing the distributor portal workload, and accompanying the SAP to SAP S/4HANA migration to guarantee seamless integration and interoperability across all systems.
responsibilities: Ensuring continuous evolution of the customer portal and evolutionary platform maintenance
Improving test coverage
Addressing performance issues
Optimizing development team management
Normalizing development and delivery processes
Accompanying the SAP to SAP S/4HANA migration
Guaranteeing integration and synchronization with other information systems (Salesforce, SAP, Data)
Writing technical documentation and audit/impact analysis reports
Supporting QA teams during acceptance testing
Onboarding and mentoring new development team members
Active participation in sprint prioritization and planning with PO/PM/Business teams
Organizing synchronization meetings with UI/UX, QA, DevOps, and SecOps teams
achievements: Standardization of technical environments and adoption of new development practices

work.name: ENGIE IT
work.summary: Worked on the P2P Supplier Portal (Portail Fournisseurs) across two major releases: finalizing the first release (front-end with end-user and backoffice sub-apps, REST API, high-volume data processing lambdas, first data model refactoring), then driving the second release (integration of two new ERPs, second data model refactoring, migrations). Also maintained the Agora platform (backoffice, client interfaces, REST API, lambdas). Ensured knowledge transfer and onboarding of new team members.
responsibilities: Supporting QA and acceptance teams
Task breakdown and assignment
Onboarding and mentoring of new development team members
Facilitating code review sessions and pair programming
Participation in architectural decisions, POCs and feasibility studies
Anomaly analysis and resolution
achievements: Delivered release 1 and release 2 of the P2P Supplier Portal
Delivered Agora platform evolutions and maintenance

work.name: Zaion – Callbot & Chatbot
work.summary: Zaion is a startup providing a complete AI-based voice customer relationship management solution with real-time supervision. Responsible for backend development on client projects: configuring and developing callbots, interfacing with client APIs, creating and training NLU recognition models (Machine Learning), and developing speech recognition improvement algorithms.
responsibilities: Assisting clients in the requirements specification phase
Configuration and development of qualification and processing callbots
Interfacing with client APIs
Creation and design of conversational agent recognition models
Training recognition agents (Machine Learning)
Development and automation of data extraction algorithms for analysis and improvement
Development of speech recognition improvement algorithms (alphanumeric recognition, postal addresses, names, dates, license plates)
Supporting acceptance teams
Diagnosing and correcting anomalies

work.name: Lookiimobile Tunisie
work.summary: Lookiimobile is the go-to partner for SMEs undergoing digital transformation, blending mathematics, neuroscience and design to create innovative web and mobile tools. Developed and maintained key products: Mycena (password management app for iOS/Android/Chrome), Rosyboa (neuroscience-based productivity tool), and Byblos ERP.
responsibilities: Organization and facilitation of agile ceremonies
Writing specifications and requirements documents
Technical and operational feasibility analysis
Managing technical and functional migrations
Supervising and coordinating the production team
Organizing and facilitating code review sessions
Diagnosing and tracking anomalies
Participating in monthly international product webinars
Creating and maintaining CI/CD scripts
Conducting semi-annual audits for process compliance and performance evaluation
Designing and implementing new architectures and technology choices
Training and onboarding new team members and interns
achievements: Delivered multiple product releases for Mycena, Rosyboa and Byblos ERP

references.name: Mohamed Kammoun
references.reference: Seifeddine is one of the best people I had as a partner! We've joined our hands on several projects for nearly two years. He is the consummate professional and an expert diplomat, with such excellent communication skills he was able to navigate even the most tense discussions with grace. He knows how to help his pairs and get the best out of them. Seifeddine was always reliable and professional, and at stressful times he was a positive influence on all of us. I witnessed Seifeddine's commitment to his role firsthand, and I recommend him without hesitation.

references.name: hamdi ben tiba
references.reference: Seifeddine was a great professional to work with! We worked together at Lookiimobile and he helped me a lot to get started and also to understand internal processes. He had such a remarkable ability to tackle any problem but with a warm smile! One of the most profound person I have met! Good job! Keep it up! ✨

references.name: Saifeddinne MATTALAH
references.reference: It was a pleasure working and collaborating with Seifeddine on a daily basis at Lookiimobile. Apart from a deep technical knowledge and strong expérience, he has the ability to explain issues thoroughly, and also formulate potential solutions quickly. Looking forward working with him again

references.name: Thomas Popielski
references.reference: Seifeddine a été un atout précieux dans notre équipe chez Air Liquide pendant 2 ans. C'est quelqu'un qui sait se rendre disponible et sa réactivité était très appréciée, il a su gérer des situations urgentes, apportant des solutions rapides et fiables. Je recommande vivement Seifeddine pour son professionnalisme et son esprit d'équipe !

references.name: Ahmed Ben Taleb
references.reference: Seif is one of the best developers I worked with. He has the ability to adapt and deliver a good quality code in short timelines with a great skill of quick analysis and solution oriented. All the projects in which he participated were a success and compliant to the market standards.

references.name: Gustave NGANGO
references.reference: J'ai eu la possibilité de travailler avec Seifeddine sur plusieurs projets web à Engie IT. C'est un très bon développeur, sûrement l'un des meilleurs avec qui j'ai travaillé. Capable de réfléchir rapidement, très travailleur, Intuitif et à l'écoute, il a toujours été le facteur clé de la réussite des différents projets. L'avoir dans son équipe est un vrai plus.

projects.name: Portail Fournisseurs - ENGIE
projects.description: P2P Supplier Portal for ENGIE — a full-stack application composed of end-user and backoffice front-ends, a REST API acting as a router/integrator between ERP systems, and high-volume data processing lambdas.

projects.name: Rosyboa
projects.description: Rosyboa is a neuroscience-based productivity tool for innovative teams. Information overload affects many people's performance and wellness at work. We help teams focus on getting things done using action-driven conversations. Rosyboa is the only team collaboration tool that doubles up as a collective brain, turning conversations into stories.

projects.name: Mycena Business
projects.description: Mycena Pro is a password management app for iOs and Android. Companies can create an account online and subscribe their companies and employees to Mycena Pro, allowing each user to create their own password fortress with three levels of security.

projects.name: Mycena Individual
projects.description: Mycena is a password security solution for organisations holding sensitive information. 81% of breaches are linked to weak/stolen passwords. We help employees use strong passwords by default and store them locally and securely. Mycena is the only Identity and Access Management solution with a fully distributed risk model - where everyone keeps their keys secure in their pocket.
highlights: Passwords encrypted and saved locally on device, NOT on the cloud.
Three levels of security for different sensitivity passwords
Access with finger print/ pin, lock pattern, face ID or voice passphrase

projects.name: MyCena Web Extension (Chrome / Firefox)
projects.description: MyCena web extension allows you to copy and paste passwords from your mobile to the desktop.
highlights: Useful for: When you want to use a login and password on the desktop, you don't have to type it. Go to your MyCena app and touch to copy. Then click the field and select Paste.
When you want to copy a login or password from your desktop onto your MyCena mobile app. On your desktop, select and copy the text. Then touch and select paste on your MyCena mobile app.
